notes: v1.14.98 - Move roadmap Step 2: Load Master into Command (New-UI shift-start). The Command Center cold-start now surfaces the Load-Master action so a shift can begin entirely in the New UI without the legacy NOW dashboard. cmd_render computes masterLoaded (via master_hasMaster); when profile is confirmed but no Master is loaded (rung B), the lens reads 'Load your Master' and the NBA becomes 'LOAD MASTER' -> new cmd_loadMaster(), which reuses the existing async master_loadFile() loader (opens the file picker in-gesture, no legacy showPage('master') jump) and re-renders Command when the load resolves so the NBA advances to 'Capture a rack'. Gated to the cold state (rung B) so work-aware NBAs in rung C are unchanged. Reuse-not-rebuild; legacy NOW 'LOAD MASTER ->' button and master_loadFile untouched; all under body.rd / Command which is redesign-only.
